reference: My four point five-year-old daughter is having a high fever of one hundred and two degrees Fahrenheit. She has been taking Septran antibiotic for the last two years related to a urinary infection. One of the doctors prescribed Fepanil two hundred and fifty milligrams, but the fever is not subsiding right now. What should be the medicine to be consumed now?
text: My four point five year old daughter is having a high fever of one hundred and two degrees Fahrenheit. She has been taking ceftazidime antibiotic for the last two years related to a urinary infection. One of the doctors prescribed cepheneil two hundred and fifty milligrams, but the fever is not subsiding right now. What should be the medicine to be consumed now?
